lines.speaker: Shipwright Sasha
lines.text: Greeting! What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to buy a new boat.

lines.speaker: Shipwright Sasha
lines.text: Of course! Which one would you like?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to customise a boat.

lines.speaker: Shipwright Sasha
lines.text: Not a problem. Just let me know which boat you want to customize and I'll get things set up for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to recover a boat.

lines.speaker: Shipwright Sasha
lines.text: Certainly! Let me know which boat you want retrieving and I'll call in a port wizard to teleport it over.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to destroy a boat.

lines.speaker: Shipwright Sasha
lines.text: Yes, I can sort that for you. We love a bit of free scrap here.
